policy_statement: As an EU Member State, commit to mobilise 0.15% to 0.20% of GNI as ODA allocated to Least Developed Countries (LDCs) by 2030.

Set P-3AC (NAP) result-indicator targets for 2020 and 2030, including: municipalities covered by adaptation plans (60% by 2020; 100% by 2030) and multiple sector targets (water efficiency, contingency/adaptation plans by companies, coastline erosion, precision irrigation, etc.).
